blog_title: ₹50K vs ₹2 Lakh DTF Printer — Print Head Life, Real Cost & Which One Indian Printers Should Buy
caption:
₹50K DTF printer = ₹15K print head replacement in 3 months 😬

A client called last week. His budget printer's head died. He thought he saved money — ended up spending ₹1 lakh in year one.

Expensive printers (₹2L) use industrial heads lasting 2-3 years. Speed? 50 prints/hour vs 10.

If you print under 30 pieces daily, budget works. Over 100? You'll hit a wall.

Save this post if you're buying a DTF printer soon 👇
